title: 夢の大舞台　春の天皇賞

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text: McQueen, that race was stunning! Congratulations!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro's halls are adorned with countless victories—and I've finally
earned a plaque of my own!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I was not expecting such a resounding display of joy from the
ever-demure McQueen.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's clear just how much the race meant to her, and why she felt so
much pressure to win it.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: I apologize, I lost my composure. I do believe I've earned a bit of elation, however.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: In addition, I want to thank you for helping me reach this result.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
To think that you would dedicate all your efforts just for me... I am
truly grateful.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm the one who should be doing all the thanking. You placed all your
faith in a newbie trainer like me, and delivered an amazing win!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
...If I were to say that to her now, though, she would probably scold
me for a lack of self-confidence.
choice_data_list: An amazing win for Team Sirius!
An amazing win for Team Sirius!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, yes. Let's continue to seize them wherever the road may take
us!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Now, I'll go make the winning concert one to remember. It's the least I
can do to thank everyone who cheered me on!
